args.query: SELECT CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END AS AgentId, SUM(COALESCE(oi.Quantity,0) * COALESCE(oi.UnitPrice,0)) AS total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END AS AgentId, SUM(COALESCE(oi.Quantity,0) * COALESCE(oi.UnitPrice,0)) AS total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;
